AxReportDesign.Name: Report
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>0ebe6b0c-272a-428e-aa84-9ca044989737</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="ZeroRatedSalesReport"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="FromDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ZeroRatedSalesReport_FromDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="ToDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ZeroRatedSalesReport_ToDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmCustAccount"> <Value>=Parameters!ZeroRatedSalesReport_parmCustAccount.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="BusinessSegment"> <Value>=Parameters!ZeroRatedSalesReport_BusinessSegment.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="ConnectionType"> <Value>=Parameters!ZeroRatedSalesReport_ConnectionType.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmInvoiceId"> <Value>=Parameters!ZeroRatedSalesReport_parmInvoiceId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGZeroRatedSalesReportDP.ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="DescriptionOfGoodsServices"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.DescriptionOfGoodsServices</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGBusinessSegmentLabel"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.ETGBusinessSegment:LABEL(ETGBusinessSegment)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGBusinessSegmentName"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.ETGBusinessSegment:NAME(ETGBusinessSegment)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGConnectionTypeLabel"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.ETGConnectionType:LABEL(ETGConnectionType)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGConnectionTypeName"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.ETGConnectionType:NAME(ETGConnectionType)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGExciseDuty"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.ETGExciseDuty</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InvoiceDate"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.InvoiceDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InvoiceId"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.InvoiceId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ItemId"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.ItemId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="SalesId"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.SalesId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="SalesName"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.SalesName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="SourceBaseAmountCur"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.SourceBaseAmountCur</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="SourceRegulateAmountCur"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.SourceRegulateAmountCur</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TaxRegistrationNumber"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.TaxRegistrationNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Total"> <DataField>ETGZeroRatedSalesTmp.1.Total</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>ZeroRatedSalesReport</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <ReportSection> <Body> <ReportItems> <Textbox Name="Textbox1"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value xml:space="preserve"> </Value> <Style /> </TextRun> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@ETG_New:ZeroRatedStandardRatedSalesReport</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox1</rd:DefaultName> <Top>0.74653in</Top> <Height>0.25694in</Height> <Width>13.00222in</Width> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <TopBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </TopBorder> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Tablix Name="Tablix1"> <TablixBody> <TablixColumns> <TablixColumn> <Width>1.05556in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1.11111in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.75in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1.14583in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.53472in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>0.79861in</Width> </TablixColumn> </TablixColumns> <TablixRows> <TablixRow> <Height>0.25in</Height> <TablixCells> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@ETG_New:TPINofPurchaser</Value> <Style> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily>
